channel.title: Graphics on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Graphics on Arrans github.io

item.title: lettier/3d-game-shaders-for-beginners
item.description: 🎮 A step-by-step guide to implementing SSAO, depth of field, lighting, normal mapping, and more for your 3D game.

item.title: lvgl/lvgl
item.description: Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

item.title: dotnet/Silk.NET
item.description: The high-speed OpenGL, OpenCL, OpenAL, OpenXR, GLFW, SDL, Vulkan, Assimp, WebGPU, and DirectX bindings library your mother warned you about.

item.title: cogentcore/core
item.description: A free and open source framework for building powerful, fast, elegant 2D and 3D apps that run on macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS, Android, and the web with a single Go codebase, allowing you to Code Once, Run Everywhere.

item.title: fogleman/gg
item.description: Go Graphics - 2D rendering in Go with a simple API.

item.title: friendly/HistData
item.description: Data Sets from the History of Statistics and Data Visualization
